basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra (NIT Kurukshetra) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for Driver Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the NIT Kurukshetra office with original documents and self-attested copies.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 57 years of age at the time of engagement.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 57 years Age relaxation rules will be applicable as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Matriculation or ITI pass in relevant subject/area, valid driving license for LMV/HMV, knowledge of motor mechanism, and at least 3 years of driving experience.
qualification.details: Matriculation or ITI pass in relevant subject/area from a recognized Board or Institute. Possessing a valid driving license for driving an LMV/HMV. Knowledge of motor mechanism. Experience of driving a motor vehicle for at least 3 years.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Kurukshetra Driver Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Driver post at NIT Kurukshetra?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Driver post at NIT Kurukshetra is scheduled for 16th June 2026. Candidates should report for document verification at 10:00 AM and the interview will commence at 11:00 AM on the same day.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Driver position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed Matriculation or ITI in a relevant subject/area from a recognized Board or Institute to be eligible for the Driver position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for the Driver role?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates need to have at least 3 years of experience in driving a motor vehicle. Additionally, knowledge of motor mechanism is also a requirement.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Driver post is not exceeding 57 years of age at the time of engagement. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the summary.

faq.question: Q5. What type of job is this? Contract or Permanent?
faq.answer: The Driver position at NIT Kurukshetra is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q6. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You need to carry all original certificates, one set of self-attested copies of certificates, a recent passport-size photograph, and an original identity proof for verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the venue for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in the Golden Jubilee Administrative Building of NIT Kurukshetra. Candidates should report to the Board Room for document verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the reporting time for document verification?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to report at 10:00 AM in the Board Room of the Institute on the day of the walk-in interview for document verification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the interview timing for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Driver post will start at 11:00 AM on 16th June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article or by visiting the official website of NIT Kurukshetra.
